response.justification: While Bogdan brings exceptional breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with 34 years of experience, the role requires specialized AI/ML strategy expertise and demonstrated products built with AI. His resume shows only recent tooling work with MCP and AI-agent infrastructure, not AI product strategy, platform development, or machine learning expertise. For a director-level AI strategy principal engineer role, this represents a critical domain gap despite strong general engineering credentials.
strengths: 34 years of software engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) with demonstrated mastery of diverse tech stacks
Current engagement with modern AI infrastructure (MCP, Model Context Protocol, AI-agent frameworks) shows awareness of cutting-edge tooling
Strong software craftsmanship philosophy (TDD, CI/CD, testing culture) and ability to establish engineering practices at scale across teams
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI/ML or machine learning—no AI products, platforms, or research projects mentioned despite this being the core focus
Limited cloud platform strategy experience; AWS CDK mention is tactical tooling, not strategic cloud architecture or platform differentiation work
Career pattern shows technical generalist across many domains rather than specialized strategic focus in AI; no master's/PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification)
